MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

James H. Ghilotti, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Dale Payne, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Foley-PMI, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on November 8, 2006.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 15, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Dale Payne, and against the Defaulted Defendant Foley-PMI, Inc., as follows:

Economic Damages - $50,000.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $300,000.00.
Total - $350,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MOORE BROS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Katie Allen, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied, failure to shift burden of proof. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and discovery responses are not factually void. Plaintiff testified that he worked with defendant's asbestos blankets, gloves, and sleeves. Defendant does not present any evidence that it did not deliver supplies to plaintiff's job sites.
